case_title: RAJANKUMAR, PATEL vs. DAWN OF AQUARIUS et al

docket_entries.description: DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT DAWN OF AQUARIUS
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT DAWN OF AQUARIUS ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS

DEPT#8 - JUDGE HERBERT DONALDSON - JOHN LEWIS, CT. RPT. - GUY DECKER, CT. CLERK - J. TRIAL RESUMED. PL. & DEF. PRESENT W/COUNSEL. WITNESSES SWORN, EXH. MARKED & ENTERED FOR BOTH PARTIES. CLOSING ARGUMENTS GIVEN & REBUTTAL BY PL. JUDGE INSTRUCTS JURY. BAILIFF SWORN & JURY RETIRES TO DELIBERATE. JURY FINDS DEF. NOT NEGLIGENT. JURY INDIV. POLLED (11 TO 1) EXH. W/DRAWN & DEF. ATTY TO PREPARE JUDGMENT. CT. ADJOURNED.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DAWN OF AQUARIUS THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1554 HOWARD ST, #110, S.F, CA., STAYED UNTIL OCT-15-1996, LEASE FORFEITED, PL. WAIVES ALL BACK RENT & DAMAGES IF DEF. VACATES BY 10-15- 96. FINDINGS OF S.F. RESIDENTIAL RENT CONTROL BOARD ARE BIN DING TO BOTH PARTIES. PROPERTY LEFT ON PREMISES DEEMED ABAND ONED. DEF. REPR.THERE ARE NO OTHER OCCUPANTS. IF DEF COMPLIE W/ALL TERMS,PL WILL S/A JUDGM & DISM. SEE JUDGM FOR DETAILS.
STIPULATION AND ORDER TO SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT JUDGMENT OF SEP-24-1996 SET ASIDE
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF RAJANKUMAR, PATEL AS TO DEFENDANT DAWN OF AQUARIUS DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT DAWN OF AQUARIUS

DEPT#8 - JUDGE HERBERT DONALDSON - JOHN LEWIS, CT. RPT.- GUY DECKER, CT. CLERK - C/C FOR J. TRIAL. PL. PRESENT W/ARNOLD EVJE AS ATTY. DEF. PRESENT & IN PRO PER. ROLL TAKEN & QUALIF. OATH ADMIN. TO JURY PANEL. VOIR DIRE CONDUCTED & 12 JURORS & 1 ALT. JUROR SWORN TO TRY CAUSE. OPENING STATEMENTS MADE, WITNESSES SWORN & TESTIFY & EX- HIBITS MARKED & ENTERED. PL. & DEF. REST THEIR CASE. JURY ADMONISHED & ORDERED RETURN 9-17-96, 10AM. CT. ADJOURNED.
JUDICIAL COUNCIL (CIVIL COVER SHEET) FILED BY PLTF.
9/9/96 DEPT JUDGE DESMOND CLERK GMCGREW C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. SETTLEMENT NOT REACHED. TRIAL DATE 9/16/96 STANDS.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
